C:\WINDOWS\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Ubuntu --exec /bin/bash -c "export CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS=ON && export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd /home/hala/chess-part2/Chess/cmake-build-debug && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=/usr/bin/gcc '-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/g++' -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S /home/hala/chess-part2/Chess -B /home/hala/chess-part2/Chess/cmake-build-debug"
CMake Deprecation Warning:
  Support for "Extra Generators" like

    CodeBlocks

  is deprecated and will be removed from a future version of CMake.  IDEs may
  use the cmake-file-api(7) to view CMake-generated project build trees.
